titleStmt.title: SII 17.712: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 712. (A.R. No. 655 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the Bhairava shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.

This inscription records the gift of 3 māḍai of gold left in the hands of the śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple, by Kārippiḷḷai, son of Śeṅgamiṭṭi Kuḍiyār of Paṇḍāri-Śeṟuvaṉūr, in Mēlaippaḍaiyūr-nāḍu, for burning a twilight lamp in the temple of Tirukkārikaraippiḷḷaiyār in Niṉṟaiyūr-nāḍu, in Naḍuvu-malai in Kuṉṟavattanakkōṭṭam, a sub-division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājate
vaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 5 vatu ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalat
tu kuṉṟavattaṉakkoṭṭattu naṭuvumalai niṉṟaiyūr nāṭṭu
Āḷuṭaiyār tirukkārikaraip piḷḷaiyārkku melaippa
ṭaiyūr nāṭṭil paṇṭāri ceṟuvaṉūril ceṅkamiṭṭi kuṭiyā
r makaṉ kārip piḷḷai Ivaṉ Ippiḷḷaiyārkkuc caṉti vi
ḷakku 1 kku Iṭṭa māṭai 3 Immāṭai muṉṟum Ik koyilil
śivappirāmaṇar Aṉpanāyaka paṭṭaṉṉum Āṇṭāṉ paṭṭaṉ
ṉum Āḷkkoṇṭa piḷḷaiyum Ivaṉ tampi nāyakappiḷḷaiyum
pūcāri paṭṭaṉṉum Ivaṉ tampi kārip piḷḷaiyum tiruvāṇṭaiyum
Ivvaṉaivom Immāṭai muṉṟum koṇṭu Upaiyamāka
koṇṭu caṉtirātittavarai caṉtiviḷakku Oṉṟu Erikka
kaṭavom Ivvaṉaivom śrī māheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.712 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
